name: Launch Sprint
headline: Use a high-touch offer to create early cash flow and faster customer wins
idealFor: Best for buyers who want implementation, not just software access
description: Launch Sprint is the practical bridge between product ambition and paid outcomes. It packages setup, strategy, implementation, and workflow creation into a fast-start offer.
bullets: Set up core pages, messaging, and the first workflow system
Reduce time to value for new customers
Create premium service revenue while the software matures

deliverables.title: Offer and messaging setup
deliverables.description: Clarify the promise, buyer lane, and page structure so the funnel can convert with more confidence.

deliverables.title: Implementation mapping
deliverables.description: Translate the work into launch assets, workflows, and operating structure instead of leaving the buyer with a blank dashboard.

deliverables.title: Operator handoff
deliverables.description: Leave the buyer with a more usable system and a cleaner path into recurring software usage.

timeline.title: Scope the brief
timeline.description: Collect the business goal, offer, pages, and workflow outcomes that matter most.

timeline.title: Build the launch layer
timeline.description: Stand up the first message, page, and operating structure inside the VoiceToWebsite system.

timeline.title: Hand off the next move
timeline.description: Leave the buyer with a clearer software path, stronger proof, and a better foundation for follow-on work.

proofPoints.title: Lead-form-first by design
proofPoints.description: This offer closes best when the buyer can explain the job to be done before commercial scope is finalized.

proofPoints.title: Implementation revenue now, software expansion later
proofPoints.description: Launch Sprint creates immediate revenue while improving the odds that the buyer becomes a stronger long-term software customer.

sections.title: Done-with-you setup
sections.description: Guide the buyer through positioning, offer design, workflow mapping, and execution structure.

sections.title: Faster activation
sections.description: A guided sprint lowers friction for customers who would otherwise stall out after signup.

sections.title: Stronger customer outcomes
sections.description: Better implementation creates better retention, testimonials, and expansion opportunities.

leadForm.heading: Submit the implementation brief for Launch Sprint
leadForm.intro: Use this form to describe the outcome, pages, workflows, and timeline you want help with before moving into a scoped implementation conversation.

cta.heading: Sell Launch Sprint when the buyer needs traction before self-serve.
cta.body: This offer should qualify through a strong brief first, then move into scoped implementation without pretending every buyer is ready for direct checkout.
